word: H5854 - עַטְרֹות בֵּית יֹואָב - ʻAṭrôwth bêyth Yôwʼâb - at-roth' bayth yoawb' - Ataroth the house of Joab

sections.paragraph:
Original: עטרות בּית יואב

Transliteration: ‛aṭrôth bêyth yô'âb

Phonetic: at-roth' bayth yo-awb'

BDB Definition:

Ataroth = "the crowns of"
  1. the house of Joab, a place in Judah

Origin: from the same as H5852 and H1004 and H3097

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
